videos.headline: Jayden Maiava finds the end zone for USC's first TD of the day
videos.description: USC quarterback Jayden Maiava keeps it and cruises into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Maiava finds the end zone for USC's first TD of the day) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Waymond Jordan dodges tacklers for a USC TD
videos.description: Waymond Jordan gives USC a two-score lead late in the first half as he scores a 6-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Waymond Jordan dodges tacklers for a USC TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Purdue improvises with TD on botched trick play
videos.description: USC nearly blows up Purdue's trick play, but Ryan Browne recovers a fumble and scores a Boilermakers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Purdue improvises with TD on botched trick play) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: USC DT Jamaal Jarrett motors for a 70-yard pick-six
videos.description: Jamaal Jarrett scores on an interception for USC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (USC DT Jamaal Jarrett motors for a 70-yard pick-six) 2025/09/13 ESHEET
